description.zh: 做游戏设计(技能)· 输入 /make-game-design 触发,引导 cc-coder 在约 30 分钟内把一句话愿景拆成可交付落码的最小设计文档(玩法 / 数值 / 角色 / 章节),落到 design/<slug>.md。
description.en: Make Game Design skill — type /make-game-design and it guides cc-coder to turn a one-line vision into a minimal, build-ready design doc (gameplay / numbers / characters / chapters) in ~30 minutes, written to design/<slug>.md.
